description: The Is Punctuation node takes in a character literal and returns if that character is a punctuation character.

fields.* ([[Type:bool|bool]]): Returns ``true`` if ``Character`` is a punctuation character, ``false`` otherwise. Punctuation characters recognized by this node are given the Unicode delegation ``Pc``, ``Pd``, ``Ps``, ``Pe``, ``Pi``, ``Pf``, or ``Po``.
